rooms.name: Town Square
rooms.description: A cobblestone square at the centre of a small town. A well stands in the middle.

rooms.name: Forest Edge
rooms.description: Tall oaks line the path. Sunlight barely filters through the canopy.

rooms.name: Tavern
rooms.description: A warm, smoky tavern. The barkeep nods as you enter.

rooms.name: Deep Forest
rooms.description: The trees press close. Strange sounds echo from the darkness.

monsters.name: Goblin
monsters.attack: The Goblin snarls and lunges at you!
